bird.summary: The black-throated coucal (Centropus leucogaster) is a species of cuckoo in the family Cuculidae. It is found in West Africa in dense secon…

locations.name: 西非
locations.summary: 西非通常是指非洲大陆南北分界线和向西凸起部分的大片地区，为地理、人种和文化过渡地带。 非洲大陆南大西洋海岸线在这一地区呈东西走向的部分曾以象牙海岸、黄金海岸而闻名。奴隶贸易在这里被人操纵，现在绝大多数非洲裔美国人就是当时从西非贩运到美国的…

locations.name: 薩伊共和國
locations.summary: 扎伊尔共和国（法語：République du Zaïre，英語：Republic of Zaire）是今日刚果民主共和国於1971年10月27日到1997年5月17日期间使用的国名。扎伊尔是由葡萄牙語從剛果語Nzadi一詞中衍生，其意思…

relations.subject: Black-throated coucal
relations.evidence: It is found in West Africa in dense second growth along forest edge and grassy swamps

relations.subject: Black-throated coucal
relations.evidence: The subspecies found in northern and central Zaire is sometimes split as Neumann's coucal (Centropus neumanni)

relations.subject: Black-throated coucal
relations.evidence: It is found in West Africa in dense second growth along forest edge and grassy swamps
relations.object_summary: 具有较高含水量和密生植被的浅水环境。

relations.subject: Black-throated coucal
relations.evidence: Its range includes Cameroon, The Democratic Republic of Congo, Côte d'Ivoire, Gabon, Ghana, Guinea, Guinea-Bissau, Liberia, Niger, Nigeria, Senegal, Sierra Leone, and Togo. Its typical habitat is the edges of secondary forest, clearings, undergrowth, rough grassland, the edges of marshes, savannah, and the strips of gallery forest beside rivers
relations.object_summary: 东非常见的开放草地与湿地边缘复合景观。
